author: mthuret
subject: v4.1.0-beta.3
body: # [4.1.0-beta.3](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.0-beta.2...v4.1.0-beta.3) (2017-07-25) ### Bug Fixes * **error:** reset error when receiving results of a query (not when sending it) (algolia/react-instantsearch#179) ([0118ba0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0118ba0)) * **highlight:** wrong parsing between client and server (algolia/react-instantsearch#183) ([179f7e8](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/179f7e8)) * **poweredBy:** SSR compatibility (algolia/react-instantsearch#181) ([a644aba](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/a644aba)) ### BREAKING CHANGES * **highlight:** We remove the timestamp present in our highlight preTag and postTag. If you were using regex to parse the highlighting results then you'll need to adapt it as now it's only "ais-highlight".
